name: copa-2026-stats
description: Dashboard interativo de estatísticas da Copa do Mundo FIFA 2026 (PWA)

scripts.build: rm -rf _site && mkdir -p _site/copa && cp -r index.html manifest.json sw.js css js data icons _site/copa/ && cp CNAME _site/CNAME && printf '<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=copa/">' > _site/index.html && touch _site/.nojekyll
